elements.name: TC-PRA-001 | REQ-PRA-001 GET /Practitioner/{id} returns 200 and resourceType = Practitioner
TC-PRA-002 | REQ-PRA-002 name element is present and non-empty
TC-PRA-003 | REQ-PRA-003 identifier system and value are present (conditional)

steps.name: if (!hasIdentifier) karate.log('TC-PRA-003: SKIP — identifier not present on resolved Practitioner ' + practitionerId)

elements.name: TC-PRA-004 | REQ-PRA-001 | REQ-OO-001 non-existent ID returns 404 and OperationOutcome

elements.name: TC-PRA-005 | REQ-GEN-001 captured practitioner-read.json exists for HL7 Validator

steps.name: def fileExists = java.nio.file.Files.exists(java.nio.file.Paths.get('target/responses/practitioner/practitioner-read.json'))
comments: # karate.write() resolves paths under target/ when running under Maven

elements.name: TC-PRA-006 | REQ-GEN-002b meta.versionId is present and non-null
